headline: Celanese Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Celanese (NYSE:CE) executives said the company is prioritizing cash generation and operational flexibility as weak end-market demand continues, while supply chain disruptions are creating near-term opportunities in parts of its acetyls business.
